dct_description_sm: studio Chri. Weigelii Norimbergae, cum privil[egio], S[acra] C[aesareae] M[ajestatis]
Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian
Covers northern Libya and eastern Tunisia
Shows historical place names and boundaries
Includes illustrations of coins in lower right
